items.title: [Google Play 差评] ★1 I'd like to ask something in regards of
items.summary: I'd like to ask something in regards of the 365 day limit of inactivity. What if one lost their phone or means to activate the account, or simply forgot they had an account? What if then they wish to return to this game, only to see the things they worked hard for gone? Thanks in advance, i'd love a reply so we can chat more.
items.author: Hm
